title: Docs-only evidence wording is not a semantic evidence mutation
text:
*** Update File: docs/example.md
+ 検証証拠: audit-request --kind document を実行し、status pass を確認。
+ 受入基準: 文書の usage と limitations が読める。
intent: docs に検証証拠を追記する。
rationale: Document-only evidence wording should be classified as a document-only boundary, not a meaning warning.
